headings.strategy: Expressive, tight letter spacing for large headers (tracking-tighter), elegant italics for emphasis.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing (py-24, py-32). The 'Bento' Grid for collections.

grid_modes.marketing: Asymmetrical 12-column grid. Large images spanning multiple columns.
grid_modes.product_catalog: Strict 3-column or 4-column grid, dense but with massive bottom margins.

components.navigation: Crystal Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) on scroll, or completely transparent at top. Must have solid contrast.
components.buttons: Minimalist luxury. Primary: Solid deep emerald (#022B22) or Obsidian (#0A0A0A) with white text, hover state scales slightly. Secondary: 1px solid border, transparent background.
components.cards: Flat background, no shadow, 1px subtle border (#EAEAEA). Focus strictly on the product image.
components.forms: Bespoke Custom Jewelry form must use Shadcn inputs but styled with 1px bottom borders (flaired, luxurious) instead of full boxes.
components.cart_wishlist: Slide-out sheet (Shadcn Sheet) for cart. Minimalist wishlist heart icons on products.

pages.name: Home (Editorial Marketing)
sections: Hero: Full bleed image, heavy typography, slight parallax. Max overlay black/20.
Featured Collections: Asymmetric grid (Rings, Necklaces, Bracelets).
The Atelier (Craftsmanship): Dark section (#0A0A0A) highlighting the handmade process.
Bespoke CTA: Elegant banner directing to custom jewelry form.
Reviews/Testimonials: Slow editorial marquee or large typographic carousel.

pages.name: Shop (Catalog)
sections: Product Grid: High-res images, on-hover secondary image reveal. Wishlist icon.

pages.name: Product Detail
sections: Split layout: Sticky product details on right, massive scrolling gallery on left.
Details: Price, Material selector (18k Gold, Platinum), Add to Cart.

pages.name: Bespoke Inquiry
sections: Step-by-step elegant form for custom jewelry (budget, materials, inspiration upload).

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis smooth scroll recommended. Fade-up staggered entrance for catalog items.
motion_and_interactions.buttons: Hover fills with brand color, text inverts.

hero_images.description: Woman in white off shoulder shirt wearing silver necklace, perfect for the luxurious editorial hero.

product_images.description: Close up of a pearl necklace
Close-up of a sparkling diamond engagement ring
Silver diamond ring on black box
Gold diamond studded ring on white textile

editorial_images.description: Fire in close up photography, jewel making process
Diamond ring displayed on a soft blue velvet stand

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='category-link').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Cormorant Garamond and Outfit.
Install dependencies: lucide-react for icons, framer-motion for smooth transitions, and react-router-dom for routing.
Build out the Home, Shop, Product Detail, Cart (Sheet), and Bespoke Inquiry pages.
Ensure UI is fully responsive, using Tailwind's 'grid' extensively. Use HTML-based layout for complex masonry grids.
Create a robust mock local JSON catalog structure with realistic jewelry data, prices, variants, and reviews to prepare for future Shopify integration.
